findings.title: __resetGeoState exported but only used in tests
findings.description: The __resetGeoState function is exported solely for test cleanup but could accidentally be called in production code, potentially breaking debounce state.
findings.impact: Only affects rate-limiting behavior if called accidentally
findings.recommendation: Consider making this a module-internal test helper or documenting the underscore-prefix convention as internal-only

findings.title: Missing input validation on address length
findings.description: geocodeAddress accepts any string length. Extremely long addresses may cause URL length issues with Nominatim.
findings.impact: Nominatim would likely return an error, but user experience could be confusing
findings.recommendation: Add a maximum address length check (e.g., 500 characters) that returns null with an appropriate error message

findings.title: Static module-level debounce state
findings.description: lastCallTime is a module-level variable. In multi-tab scenarios, rapid calls across tabs could interfere with each other's rate limiting.
findings.impact: Acknowledged design decision for this increment
findings.recommendation: Document this limitation if multi-tab support is needed in the future

findings.title: Error messages contain user-facing text in English only
findings.description: Error messages like 'Please try a more specific address or enter coordinates manually' are hardcoded in English.
findings.impact: i18n is out of scope for this increment
findings.recommendation: Plan for i18n in future increments

findings.title: Subscribe page QR fallback on network error
findings.description: On fetch failure, the page shows the 'not configured' placeholder. Real errors are masked by this graceful degradation.
findings.recommendation: No action needed — this is the correct behavior
